fields.name: display_string#in the UI, name and description
completion_toast_string#in the UI, the text on the toast when you complete this challenge
required_progress_count#How many times this challenge must be progressed to complete it (unless overridden by LSP).
cookies reward#cookies for completing this challenge; can be overridden by LSP
XP reward#XP for completing this challenge; can be overridden by LSP
progress_tracking_interval#Frequency we toast your progress (think pink and deadly).
chud_progress_bitmap_sequence_index#What icon is shown in the progress toast?
auto progress on:#Conditions that progress this challenge magically (aside from incidents, which can progress any challenge)
level_name#can only be progressed on this level, if specified
map_id#can only be progressed on this map, if > 0 (only works for campaign and spartan ops)
mission id#can only be progressed on this mission, if >= 0 (only works for spartan ops)
skulls#this challenge can only be progressed with at least these skulls enabled in the game options (only works for campaign)
minimum_score#must score at least this many points, if > 0 (only works for campaign)
maximum_player_death_count#must die no more than this many times, if >= 0
maximum_level_completion_seconds#must complete the level in no more than this many seconds, if > 0

options: auto_progress#progresses the instant all requirements are met
spartan ops- completed all weekly missions on easy (or harder)
spartan ops- completed all weekly missions on normal (or harder)
spartan ops- completed all weekly missions on hard (or harder)
spartan ops- completed all weekly missions on impossible
